assembly.noSrt: SRT ayaan jirin. Awoodo stage 7 hore.

asset.dropToRemove: Soo deji si looga saaro jadwalka

audio.continuousTitle: Row play wuu sii wada xigaa clip-ka xiga (off = mid keliya)
audio.createVoiceTitle: Du'i codka: ku raadi clip yar iyo nad (mp3/wav/m4a/mp4) oo OmniVoice ayaa abuuri karta profile aad ku weeyin karta character.
audio.generateSfxTitle: Isticmaal LLM-ka ku dhow si aad u akhriso farqada sida radio play iyo si aad u tuso sawtiga. Favoring kit-ka aad horey u qabaneystay. Cusbinta waa lagu fidiyey timeline-ka apply.
audio.holdPlaceholder: (hold cue — typing halkan ayaa daabaca sawt VO)
audio.preCacheTitle: Ku mid gali dhammu codka episode-ka ah browser-ka si lagu ciyaari kahel waxaa la proxy Cloudflare
audio.sectionSubtitle: / per cue · drop SFX oo dhex jira cues
audio.selectCueHint: Doorso cue-ka gudaheeda si aad u arkid metadata-kiisa oo dhan.
audio.voicesTitle: Ku weeya codkii la du'ay qofka halkee. (qora manifest.voice.speaker_map).
createvoice.doneFooterNote: Rogi jilbaha Voice Roster / manifest ay adeegso VO.
createvoice.errNameRequired: Magaca codka ayaa loo baahan yahay.
createvoice.footerNote: Naxaas iyada OmniVoice oo 2080 Ti. kuwi-ga waxaa si tooska ah loogu qabadejo ilaa 24kHz mono. Codka magaca isku mid ayaa bedelay.
createvoice.hintRefClip: (mp3 / wav / m4a / mp4 — yar yar furaha xagga codka target-ka)
createvoice.hintVoiceName: (tusaale ahaan: Vivian — noqon doonta OmniVoice-ga profile magaca)
createvoice.title: SAMEE CODKA
createvoice.workingMsg: Bilaab OmniVoice (naxaas kowaad halkaa oo jira inta dheeraatay ilaa 3 min oo lagu soojiso GPU) iyo naxaas… dhig tan fadac oo furan.
diagnostics.bannerFailed: Some required checks failed — see below.
diagnostics.preflightNote: This runs the installer preflight (<0>{cmd}</0>) on the host. It only checks — it never installs anything.
diagnostics.title: System diagnostics
docs.editorHint: UTF-8 · markdown · LF · Ctrl/Cmd+S to save
docs.sharedEditorTitle: Editing this changes it for every show
dopesheet.continuousTitle: Row play wuu sii wada xigaa clip-ka xiga (off = mid keliya)
dopesheet.dragHint: / drag card-ka laga timeline drawer onto cue
dopesheet.title: DOPE SHEET
filemenu.cloneVoicesBody.one: Imporka waxaa keena {n} cod oo tustuaca oo midab. Nuqdiska dib-ku-hab waxaa ka dhisaa OmniVoice-ka caasimadda kumbuyuutarkaaga oo dib-u-dheejiyo hadalkaan {show} oo ay ku hadlaan. Waxaa billaabata OmniVoice oo ayaa faa'ida GPU-ga (~ilbiriqsi yar oo cod). Waxay sidatan ahaataa dhamaadkii maqal-dhigga.
filemenu.cloneVoicesBody.other: Imporka waxaa keena {n} cod oo tustuaca oo midab. Nuqdiska dib-ku-hab waxaa ka dhisaa OmniVoice-ka caasimadda kumbuyuutarkaaga oo dib-u-dheejiyo hadalkaan {show} oo ay ku hadlaan. Waxaa billaabata OmniVoice oo ayaa faa'ida GPU-ga (~ilbiriqsi yar oo cod). Waxay sidatan ahaataa dhamaadkii maqal-dhigga.
filemenu.cloneVoicesFailed: Fashilmay: {names}. Dib-u-awoodo maqal-dhigga markaas OmniVoice ay ficanaaado.
filemenu.exportAssetsCheckbox: Ku-dar assets (coddada, SFX, muusiga) — weyn zip
filemenu.exportBody: Waxaa isku-daga banaan-ka text (script, manifest, youtube) + title-card templateka. Hawl assets ah, waxaa isku-daga binary source manifest ayaa tilmaamaha — OmniVoice codda tustuaca isticmaalo, SFX, iyo muusiga — plus provenance catalogs, markaa akhataha way importi oo ay bogo regenerate-ka madax. Generated media (rendararka video / final mp4) ayaa ha isu jiraan.
filemenu.exportVoiceHint: (Cod mid ah way importi Audio-ga maqal-dhigga.)
filemenu.newEpisodeHint: Scaffold-ka manifest + script-ka oo biniyaa ay ka yeeshan banaan-ka habab. Markaas qor script-ka oo click-da Generate manifest.
filemenu.newEpisodePlaceholderTitle: Kaas oo dhan oo Lasers dhaar
filemenu.folderBody: Studio ma awoodi inay furo file manager kumbuyuutarka ay ku socoto — waxaa laga yaabaa inaad ka fiiriso kumbuyuutar kale, ama server-ka ayaa madaxa la'aan. Faylalka banaan-ka ayaa jira haybad-kan oo Studio kumbuyuutarka ah:
filemenu.folderWindowsHint: Laga Windows, ku dajiso pad-kan File Explorer-ka:
filemenu.newShowHint: Jaladida ayaa waxa yeelan folder cusub. Kodka/rendararka habab waxaa lagu nuqdisaa banaan default la - edit wax ay ka hoosayaan Settings → Banaan metadata.
filemenu.shutdownBody: Waxaa sii daysa GPU-ga — waxaa joogsiiya ComfyUI, OmniVoice, iyo Ollama-ga kontejnarrada — markaas joogsiiya MACU Studio server. Studio marka hore isticmaal wayuu baahan tahay inay billaabato terminal hore ah (<0>{cmd}</0>, ama nidaamka systemd).
filemenu.shuttingDown: MACU Studio waxaa sii daya GPU-ga oo cakandhi…
filemenu.shuttingDownBody: Waxay yareegi karta carriga browser-kaagan hadda. Billaab MACU Studio dib terminal hore ah markuu hore iska nooleya.
graphics.bespokeCardDesc: kan waxa loo qoray sida sharaxaad, maaha layout la kaydiyay, sidaas awgeed ma jiraan goobaha la wax ka beddeli karo weli. Dooro layout hoose + buuxi qoraalka si loo samayn karo (ama naqshadeeyaan layout cusub AI).
graphics.bespokeHint: Muujiyaa "Habee" (maaha "Dib u soo saaro") maxaa yeelay kaartaan waxa lagu qoray sida sharaxaad, maaha layout la wax ka beddeli karo. Habee mar si loo samayn karo Dib u soo saaro.
graphics.bespokeNoLayout: gaar — layout la wax ka beddeli karo ma jirto
graphics.briefPlaceholder: tusaale. xaashi dhibcaha Crater Bowl: SECTOR NINE SLAGS vs SECTOR FOUR GLOWBOYS, lambarrada dhibcaha waaweyn 2 → 1, 'CIYAARTOYDA HADHAY' hoos
graphics.cantRenameHint: — magac-beddelka lama samayn karo; samee kaad cusub si aad id-ka bedesho
graphics.cardBlurb.freshTitle: Cinwaan qaybta cutub kull (layout intro). AI ayaa qora labada xariiq cinwaanka waaweyn (gaagaaban, dhammaad kulul) + kicker + logline-ka scriptka.
graphics.cardBlurb.macuTitle: Furaha barnaamijka ee soo noqnoqda (layout intro). Calaamadda ereyga waxa lagu xidhnaaday "THE MACU / REPORT"; AI oo kaliya ayaa qora teaser-ka kicker + sub-ka aqoonsiga xarunta.
graphics.cardBlurb.weather: Qaybta saadaasha cimilada (layout weather). Warbixinta cimilada ee deadpan haddii-adduunka-bedelay.
graphics.cardConfigureTitle: Habee — kaartaan layout la wax ka beddeli karo ma laha weli; dejiso si dib-u-saaro-karo
graphics.cardRegenTitle: Dib u soo saaro — dib u soo saaro layout + goobaha la kaydiyay
graphics.cardTypeNote: Nooca kaarku waxa uu xisaabtamaa oo keliya marka aad gujtid "Qoraal AI ku qor" — wuxuu dooranayaa codka, goobaha la qorayo, oo u guraa layout nooca kaarkaas. Adigu qorista goobaha waxa ay ka dhigeysaa mid la'aan.
graphics.compGeneratedSuccess: layout "{key}" waxa la abuuray oo lagu doortay kore — hadda buuxi qoraalka tallaabada 3.
graphics.configureBtnTitle: Kaartaan ma laha layout/qoraal la kaydiyay — dejiso mar, ka dibna waxay noqon doontaa mid la dib-u-saaro karo
graphics.createPendingBriefTitle: Waxaad qortay kooban tallaabada 2 — guji 'Soo saaro isku-dhafka' marka hore, ama tirtir koobanku si aad u isticmaasho layout la doortay
graphics.designWithAiHelp: Waxa loo baahan yahay oo keliya marka layout kore aan ku haboonayn. Sharax kaarku; qaabka maxaliga ah (Qwen) ayaa qora layout cusub HyperFrames oo kaydiya magaca tallaabada 1 ka. Waxaad weli buuxi doontaa qoraalka tallaabada 3.
graphics.editBtnTitle: Wax ka beddel layout-ka ama qoraalka kaarkan, ka dibna dib u soo saaro
graphics.editModalFooterHint: Kaydiyo isbeddelaadkaaga oo dib u soo saaro kaarku.
graphics.genCompBtnTitle: Soo saaro layout cusub HyperFrames koobankan, kaydiyaan magaca tallaabada 1
graphics.generateFirstWarning: Guji "Soo saaro isku-dhafka" si aad u dhisto layout-kan. Ilaa aad samayneyso, "Abuur + soo saaro" waxay isticmaashaa layout kore la doortay oo ay moogaysaa koobankan.
graphics.nameFirstWarning: ↑ magac u dhig kaarku tallaabada 1 marka hore — waxay noqon doontaa magaca layout-ka cusub.
graphics.newModalFooterHint: Kaydiyo kaarku oo u soo saaro mp4 ahaan.
graphics.noTitleSelected: Cinwaanku ma la dooran — dooro mid ka dhanka midig.
graphics.regenBtnTitle: Dib u soo saaro kaarkan layout + goobaha la kaydiyay
graphics.step1Hint: Id gaagaaban, loo adeegsado magaca faylka. tusaale. lower_third, scoreboard.
graphics.step2Hint: "Isku-dhaf" waa qaabka saxaafadda ee dhaqdhaqaaqa — wuxuu go'aamiyaa meeshuu qoraalku fadhiyo iyo siduu u dhaqaaqo. Muuqaalku waxa uu muujinayaa layout la doortay; ‹TOKENS› waa meeshuu qoraalkaaga tallaabada 3 yimid.
graphics.step3Hint: Qiyamkani waxay bedelayaan ‹TOKENS›-ta layout-ka. Ku qor, ama u oggolow AI inuu qoraal ka qabto scriptka cutubkan.
graphics.thumbClickTitle: Guji si aad u weyneysid · baadh noocyada · arag qaabka + goobaha
graphics.thumbModalDesc: Waxay u soo saartaa isku-dhafka youtube_thumb final/{slug}_thumb.png. Sawirka hadda jiraa waxa la kaydiyaa marka hore.
graphics.thumbModalTitle: Dib u soo saaro sawirka YouTube
graphics.writeTextBtnTitle: Qoraal hoose ka qabta scriptka cutubkan, codka nooca kaarkan
graphics.writeThumbBtnTitle: Qor hook sawirka caafimaadsan deadpan LLM maxaliga ah (Ollama)
jobstatus.idleTitle: wax walxood processing aad yaan jirin
localize.busyOrUnrendered: render episooda, ama dhowr render-ka socodka ah dhamaysii
localize.haikuNote: Claude turjumaad oo gaara ah, weydi Claude terminal drawer-ka — waxaa ma jiro cloud hook app-ka.
localize.renderFirst: Render episooda English-ka ugu horeysii — soomaali galinta waxay dib u isticmaashaa sawirka lagu rendeeriyay iyo caagga, sidaa darteed waxay u baahan yihiin render dhammaystiran.
localize.runningNote: Luqad kasta waxay GPU queue-ka lagu rendeeriyaa, mid mid ah. Waxaad awood u leedahay inay close-to — waxay sii wadi jirtaa.
localize.title: Soomaali gali — caagga + murmada
log.empty: Wax dhacay ma jiraan weli. Ogeysiisyada iyo tilmaamaha halkan ayey soo urursanayaan.
log.title: LOG-KA HAWLAHA
metadata.emptyHint: Fiiso clip ka mid ah timeline-ka ama asset ka mid ah drawer-ka.
metadata.title: METADATA
placeholder.comingSoon: Dhawaan imanaaya. v0.1 waxay shidneysaa Marxaladda 5 (Assembly) dhamaadka ilaa dhamaadka. Marxaladaha kale ayaa ku soo biiri doona noocyada xigta.
script.generateTitle: Dib-u-faafa farqada.md oo loo yaqaan manifest cues (muuqaal kahor isdaabacin)
script.mergeHelp: Cues ayaa laga dib-u-faafay <0>script.md</0> oo la is-uruuriyey; voice profiles, character seeds, b-roll, comfyui/style/music iyo title assets ayaa la badbaadiyey. <1>manifest.json.bak</1> kaydiyey moog ayaa qoran kahor isdaabacinta.
script.modeDiffTitle: Isbarbar dhig noocyada iska-duweysay (cagaaran daabacay / cas goofiyey)
script.noChangesDetail: Farqada waxaa la xadisay manifest - wax aad qor maahan.
script.noDiffChanges: Wax beddelka aan jirin noocyada labada isbirta.
script.noVersionsYet: Noocyo iska duweysan yaan jirin. Tuq git sync button si aad u sawir farqada, oo dib soo noqoshii si aad u isbarbar dhigto.
script.oneVersionOnly: Hal nooce ee hadii dambe ({label}). Iska duweysi dib markii aad beddelto si aad u hesho iska duweyni.
script.renumbered: ⚠ dib loo tiriyey (VO cache waa iska beddelamin)
script.unmappedHint: Ku dar manifest drawer voice.speaker_map ama cues kaas oo toban VO uma helaan.
script.unmappedLabel: HADAL KALAHJIYADA VOICE MAPPING YAAN LAHAYN
settings.comfy.stub: Fiiri checkpoints ComfyUI server-ka (:8188) iyo doorso default taa show-ka. Soo socda.
settings.comfy.title: ComfyUI-ga hir model
settings.git.stub: Habayn URL-ka fog iyo branch-ka Studio ay script/manifest/youtube ku soo dejiso. Aqoonto-khaarina adeegsan keys SSH-ka box-ga. Soo socda.
settings.lang.help: Bedelayo luuqa interface-ka. Waxaa doodda u dhex jira hadii loo baahan yahay.
settings.lang.title: Luuqada
settings.show.name: Magaca muuqaalkaa
settings.theme.help: Midab midabka asaasi. Waxaa doodda u dhex jira hadii loo baahan yahay.
settings.theme.title: Midabka palette
settings.title: Habaynta
sfx.delayTitle: delay nudge — ilbiriqsi, lagu qeexayay (− horseedi / + dib u dhig laga jawaabin cue-ka)
sfx.helpAgen: Local AudioGen → 24 kHz/−3 dBFS kit-ka → pegged to
sfx.phAgenPrompt: e.g. 'heavy iron door slam, dry, close mic'
sfx.phMusicPrompt: e.g. 'sickly lo-fi big-band waltz, tape hiss, mono'
sfxgen.error.gpuBusy: GPU ay xannibad — render ayaa dhacdaa. Try again markii ay khaldan tahay.
sfxgen.gain.label: g
sfxgen.gain.title: gain — 0–1 linear
sfxgen.idle.body: Script-ka akhriso radyo play ahaan oo sound effects soo jeedin, fooreenin kit-kaaga hore.
sfxgen.idle.hint: Press Begin si loo bilaabo — spins up Ollama GPU-ka, ~30-60s.
sfxgen.loading.body: Asking local LLM-ka (Qwen2.5-7B) script-ka script-ka akhriso…
sfxgen.review.empty: No sound-effect opportunities found — model-ka waxay boggiyaan script-ka waxaa looma baahan, ama wax kasta ayaa hore loo dhigay.
sfxgen.review.helpText: Apply inserts these timeline audio-ka (manifest.sfx[]) sidoo kale drag-drop — per-gap delays ayaa auto-staggered. Library effects play immediately; "to acquire" effects ayaa placeholders intii aad fetch gaareysid (Library → Add → Freesound) under filename muujiyayay; render ayaa skip wax calaacal ah oo intaan disk-ka joogin.
sfxgen.section.acquire: NEEDS ACQUIRING ({count}) — edit search-ka, fetch later library-ka
sfxgen.section.existing: USING EXISTING SFX ({count}) — hore ayaa kit-ka joogay
sfxgen.title: GENERATE SFX LIST
sfxgen.toast.applied: SFX liiska la use-aday — {placed} la dhigay ({reused} library-ka{acq})
shotgen.applyFootnote: Apply overwrite cue planned ee dhan shots[] oo kumeelgali char/b-roll defs. Reused keys keep their existing cores + seeds.
shotgen.emptyAllFilled: cuelayaasha oo dhan waa hadii leeyihiin shots — wax loo fill karo ma jiro. Uncheck box-ka hoose inay dib plan episode-ka oo dhan.
shotgen.emptyNoShots: model wuu soo celin dhamaatay shots. Isku day dib.
shotgen.errorGpuBusy: GPU waa ku shaqeysan — wax render ah ayaa socda. Mar kale isku day markay joogto.
shotgen.loadingMain: Waa la weyddiinaya LLM lokal (Qwen2.5-7B) inay plan shots…
shotgen.onlyMissingLabel: kaliya plan cues aan cues leehin
shotgen.onlyMissingTooltip: On: kaliya plan cues oo ay cues-ba aysan lahayn (ma taaban doonayo cues aad hadii hor u setti). Off: plan dib cuelayaasha oo dhan (overwrite shots jira).
shotgen.sectionNewChars: NEW characters — minted (edit the core haddii aad jeclantahay)
shotgen.title: GENERATE SHOT LIST
sysstat.outerTooltip: host CPU · GPU · GPU RAM · storage disk I/O (updates ~2s)
terminal.helpDetail: Detach hadii aadan xirin: <0>Ctrl-b d</0> · LAN-only ({url})
terminal.helpMain: Detached. Click Connect inay la xidhaan <0>{session}</0> tmux session oo la hadal Claude.
terminal.title: TERMINAL
thumb.browseToOlderTip: Aad nooc ka duwan si aad u dooratid
thumb.fieldsNotRecorded: — ma la duubsan (la soo saaray ka hor raadraaca macluumaadka, ama ma jiraan goobaha)
thumb.title: SAWIRKA YOUTUBE
timeline.emptyVo: VO waxay muuqdaan markaas jaladii oo audio
timeline.noVideoYet: Video rendarka ayaan jirin hadda — awoodo jaladii (Assembly → Run) si ay galo synced preview.
timeline.previewSubtitle: / rendararka iska soo curi · click jaladii si ay lagu ciyaari · hahayn/graphic cusbooneysiino ay muuqdaan ka dib dib-u-render
timeline.shotMoveTip: drag si ay dhaqaan/mid-kaas-oo-kale · drop jeebka si loo tuur
timeline.timelineSubtitle: / jeeb assets ka jaladii track — scrub ruler - drag clip-ka si ay dhaqaan, timaha si loo burburiyo
toast.cardTextWritten: card text waa lagu qoray — review + edit kahor render
toast.compCreated: card "{composition}" waa la abuuri ({count} fields) — fill the values, then Create + render
toast.emergencyStopDone: emergency stop waa dhammaatay — render waa la diliyay, queue waa la naafiyay, GPU waa la furiyay
toast.emergencyStopStart: emergency stop — render waa la diliya + GPU waa la furiya…
toast.fieldsInvalidJson: fields waa inay ahaadaan JSON-ka sax
toast.gpuBusy: GPU waa ku shaqeysan — wax render ah ayaa socda. Mar kale isku day markay joogto.
toast.copyFailed: koobiya wuu dhamaatay — dooro haybad-ka oo koobiyey gacanta
toast.manifestWritten: manifest qoran — {cues} cues ({added} cusub, {reshot} dib loogu qabsaday)
toast.noAudioToCache: Codka lagu cache aad yaan jirin
toast.noMastersToCache: Ma jiro rendered masters loo cache-aan karo hadda
toast.noMissingTitles: Ma jiro titles oo la doonayo ama oo taban
toast.noMissingVo: Cues VO la ridi aad yaan jirin
toast.nothingToRender: Wax loo render karo ma jiro
toast.promptWritten: prompt waa lagu qoray · shot waa loo tilmaam stale
toast.seedUpdated: seed waa la cusboonaysii · shot {key} waa loo tilmaam stale
toast.sfxFetched: SFX waa la soo gadey oo lagu xidhay
toast.sfxGenerated: SFX waa la abuuri oo lagu xidhay
toast.shotApplied: shot list waa la adeegsaday — {appliedCues} cues, {newChars} new chars, {newBroll} new broll
topbar.gitSyncTitle: Isku soci scriptka + manifest + youtube.txt git-ka
topbar.stopConfirm: XAALADDA DEGDEG — dili soo-saaris firfircoon, nadiifi dabaqa ComfyUI, oo xor u samee xusuusta GPU?
topbar.stopTitle: Xaaladda degdeg: dili soo-saaris firfircoon, nadiifi dabaqa ComfyUI, oo xor u samee xusuusta GPU
topbar.updateTitle: Cusboonaysiis la heli karo — {behind} commit(s) cusub. Guji si aad u dib u eegto oo u rakibto.
tour.assembly.body: Render dashboard. Socodka pipeline buuxa dhamaadkiisa ilaa fiidiyow dammiyey, cid walba per-stage progress. Waa abyad gaaban - saadaalin mar kasta uu intaas fadli.
tour.assembly.title: Assembly
tour.audio.body: Per-cue voiceover — ciyaari, dib-u-abuuri line, iyo drop SFX gapyada cues u dhex.
tour.audio.title: Codka
tour.docs.body: Canon - character bible, prompt docs, iyo pipeline notes. Reference, editing maahan.
tour.docs.title: Docs
tour.episodePicker.body: Doorso episode; ◀ ▶ arrows-ka ayaa iska sii mariyey. Dot-ka waa git-sync state - cagaaran waxaa laga dhacay push, cas means local changes.
tour.episodePicker.title: Doorashada episode
tour.gitSync.body: Commits episode-ka qof ah - farqad, manifest, youtube.txt - midka repo-ka oo push-a. Media ku soo baxay ayaa ku sugan halkan; waxu aad lug u'eg source of truth.
tour.gitSync.title: Git sync
tour.graphics.body: Title cards iyo on-screen overlays. Abuuri card text iyo xajin compositions-ka ayaa lagu uruuriyey video-ka.
tour.graphics.title: Sawirka
tour.projectMenu.body: Cusub ama furan bannaaman iyo episoodyada, import/export layihaa, iyo settings — dhammu halkan ayaa ku sugan. Studio waxay karti kartaa inay qaato bannaaman badan hadii.
tour.projectMenu.title: Menuu layihaa
tour.ready.body: Inti waxaad diyaar ubaadeen — bilow abuurista show cusub iska koodu: furan project menu iyo doorso New show…. Furan tour-ka mar walba iska menuu halkan. Have fun.
tour.ready.title: Diyaar lagu bilaabo
tour.script.body: Qor episode-ka Markdown, oo dhig Generate manifest si aad u turjumeysid cues pipeline ayaa xajin kara.
tour.script.title: Farqad
tour.video.body: Shot list - qof kasta iyo b-roll clip. Xajin la doodaa ama stale ones; preview-ka ayaa tusiya natijada kasta.
tour.video.title: Fiidiyow
tour.publish.body: Dhamaadka ugu dambeeya: firsoo episoodi ahaan inta lagu kaydiyay — cinwaan, sharaxaad, sawirka hal-abuurka, isku xirida fiidiyowga la kaydiyo, iyo cidda iska arkisa — isagoo kolkaa Daabaci si aad uga turjiso mayorawesome.com.
tour.publish.title: Daabaci
update.dirtyWarning: Checkout-kan ayaa uncommitted local changes — auto-update ayaa disabled si looga gaabto clobbering. Commit ama discard (ama update terminal-ka) horey.
update.idleHint: Click "Check for updates" si aad raadsid newer build.
update.gpuBusyBody: Muuqaata GPU-ga ay xannibad ({free} MiB dawarta ah) — rendararka ayaa soconaya. Cusbooneysiinta waxay dib-u-dhisaa oo billaabiyaa Studio, kaas oo soconaya waxaa haga jabiyi kara. Waar adigaa oggolaydeen update-ka oo restart hadda?
update.phaseBuilding: Rebuilding (deps + UI)… this can take a minute.
update.phaseRestartNeeded: Update built. Restart server-ka manually si loo load.
update.title: Software update
update.updateHint: "Update & restart" pulls, rebuilds UI-ka, oo relaunches service (~1 min). Page-ka reload isuma markaa back.
video.addShotHelp: Rogi {kind} furaha manifest-ka. Bixiya sawirka LIISKA SAWIRKA.
video.addShotHelpWithCue: Rogi {kind} furaha manifest-ka iyo sawiir @{cue}. Bixiya sawirka LIISKA SAWIRKA.
video.emptyManifest: Ma jiro jilbaha ama b-roll manifest-ka.
video.generateShotListTitle: Isticmaal LLM-ka logu habeeyo si uu u soo jiiday liiska sawirka (isticmaal jilbaha iska dhaca)
video.precacheTitle: Rox kol dhow sawirka bixiyay meydka in preview-ku fudud yahay oo degdeg ah Cloudflare proxy-ga
voicepicker.exportVoiceTitle: Soo kutub {name} kuwiga reference — soo ceeli waxaa sameyn karaan makiinad kale
voicepicker.noCharacters: Ma jiro jilbaha — rogi mid hoose, ama Generate manifest oo soo qaadi iyaga script-ka.
voicepicker.omnivoiceStopped: OmniVoice joogto — naxaas ama bixiya liiska codka
youtube.captions.clientHelp: Hal mar: abuur OAuth client oo nooca "TVs and Limited Input devices" ah oo ku yaal Google Cloud projectkaaga (midka leh YouTube Data API u furan), kadib paste ID-ga iyo sirta.
youtube.captions.noTracks: Majirto subtitle tracks — haddii hore u duubso episode kani.
youtube.captions.noVideo: Majirto muuqaal YouTube oo la tumay episode kani.
youtube.captions.quotaNote: Upload kastaa waxaa isticmaalaya ~400 oo quota-da YouTube ee maalin kasta (~25 uploads/day oo limit default ah).
youtube.captions.title: Captions
youtube.notConfiguredBody: Ku dar API key + channel id <0>~/.config/macu-studio/youtube.json</0> (ama saari <1>YOUTUBE_API_KEY</1> / <2>YOUTUBE_CHANNEL_ID</2>) si aad u tusiso matched uploads halkan.
filemenu.macuWebConnectHint: Ku biro mayorawesome.com, fur banaadigtaada → Maareyn → Isku xir MACU Studio → Abuur connect token, koobee, oo ku joos halkaan. Waxay isku xira credentials-ka duud iyo push middhawr.
filemenu.macuWebConnectedHint: Isku xirtay <0>{base}</0>. Episoodyo la aasiye waxay caalamiga ah; la aasiyeen ayaa lagu soo dhaweyn laakiin oo ah draf. Kadib Daabac.
toast.macuWebCommitted: la aasiyay locally ({files} files) — kaydit credentials si aad u soo dheweynto
publish.connectHint: Ku dhex gal tokenkaaga (Manage bogga mayorawesome.com → Connect MACU Studio).
publish.publishHint: Edit qadahlooyda hore, markaa publish si aad u tuusidid website-ka.
publish.ytNoMatch: Ma jiro channel macelin magaca codeegan.
publish.videoHint: MACU Web ma haysto video — ku dhex gal liinkii halka ay joogto (YouTube). Waxaa lagu beddelan bogga codeega.
publish.thumbNone: Ma jiraan sawir la rendertay hadda — markaa run stage 5 hore.
tour.mcp.title: Iibka inta kaa ah lagu soo dhoweeyo
tour.mcp.body: Studio waxaa sidoo kale ah MCP server — wax kasta oo jira sheekadan waa qalab oo AI agent ay isticmaali karto. Studio-ga (Claude Code ama Claude Desktop) la tixgeeli http://localhost:8774/mcp markaas waxtar-kumaal noqon doonaa mid hadal: qor sheekada, codada la mid ah, soo saari, dhaliso. Eeg dukumeentiyada Connect-an-agent-ka si loo setup-o.
wizard.createFailed: lama awoodin inaan abuuro episode-ka casriga: {msg}
wizard.serviceDown: Adeeg ay tallaalkan u baahan ahi ma'a shaqeynayo hadda. Waxaad ka tegsan kartaa oo dib ka noqon kartaa maalinkaadii — horumarka aad samatay ayaa la kayfigeystay.
wizard.bannerHint: Cusub oo ah Studio? Qaado tallaal gaaban oo tilmaamo oo dhis episode-ka adag.
wizard.welcome.title: Hiya script-kaagii ugu horeeyay abuursanno
wizard.welcome.body: Tallaalkan waxay dhisataa episode-ka adag tan iyo horaha illaa dhamaystirkii — script, codka, iyo video-ga loo dhamaystay — waqtiga bila'a sagal dakiiqad. Waxa lagu billaabaa inaan abuuro episode-yar oo casriga ah oo yar oo show-ka hadda faalan. Wax waalba halkan lama taaban karo shaqada kale.
wizard.script.title: 1 · Qoro script-ka
wizard.script.body: Waxaan bilaab lamaan script-yar oo yar oo starter ah. Kasta oo liin sidii **MAGAC:** ayaa cod la ahaan doona cue, kasta oo ## jarka waxa lagu bilaabaa cutub, iyo » lintu waxa ugu jirta jawaab. Akhri waxa, beddel linnad mid, iyo ama qoro kan iska tirsanaa — markaasba martidh dhiciste Manifest (midig sare) iyo Apply.
wizard.cast.title: 2 · Qabeel codka
wizard.cast.body: Kasta oo hadal waydiiin cod. Starter-ka waxaa iska hadal la ahaan NARRATOR iyo GUEST — dooro cod kasta midoodii isku adeegsadaa codka picker-ka xiga magacyada. (Waxaad ka tegsan kartaa: hadal la ah ama la helo midab roboti cod faraha ah.)
wizard.cast.goal: Kasta oo hadal waxa leeyahay cod
wizard.renderVo.title: 3 · Abuuri dhawaaq ilama qabsan
wizard.renderVo.body: Hadda turn linyadda ilama qabsan audio-ga. Adeegsadda "Dib-u-soo-saari waxyar" si aad abuursato linyan mid-mid ah, iyo ama dib-u-saari botan midkood qof, markaasba galay ciyaar si aad clashtid. Tirada waxay raaci kartaa imisa ayaa dhamaystay.
wizard.renderVo.goal: Kasta oo cue-gu waxaa lagu abuuray
wizard.sfx.title: 4 · Sawtiga ilaalinta iyo musiqada (iska mid ahi)
wizard.sfx.body: Ku dar yar texture-a: samee raadiye dhegaha qofka so dhig oo mid ka hor jooga cue-sada, ama u bandhig musiqad bed-a. Tallaalkan waa iska-mid ah — tegee in kastaa waqtiga kasta iyo halkaa wad.
wizard.sfx.goal: Iska mid ah saaxiibka qof ah oo lagu dhigay
wizard.graphics.title: 5 · Title-ka card-sada (iska mid ahi)
wizard.graphics.body: Title-ka card-sada iyo lower-third-sada waxa lagu dhisaa HyperFrames composition-sada. Abuuri mid si aad aragtid sida loo eegayso. Iska-mid ah — tegee haddii aad raali tahay inaan saada fudud.
wizard.shots.title: 6 · Video-ka shot-sada (iska mid ahi)
wizard.shots.body: Warehouse tallaalan u turn shot-ka faalo ha yimaadde saacir yar yar oo ComfyUI. Adeegsadda "Samee shot-ka liiska" si aad u qorshaysid shot list-a, markaasba abuuri mid. Haddan waxa uu u baahan GPU adeega — tegee haddii ayan shaqeynayaan.
wizard.assemble.title: 7 · Assembly-ka episode-ka
wizard.assemble.body: Assembly-ka waxay socodka raasaan iska billow — hadal, video, musiqad, subtitle-sada — iyo qalab-bixin video-ga loo dhamaystay. Galay Socodka iyo arki live log-ka. Tallaalkan waa tallaalan GPU-da midir; tegee haddii adeega-sada hodan iyo dib ka noqo maalinkaadii.
wizard.assemble.goal: Video-ga loo dhamaystay ayaa lagu abuuray
wizard.publish.title: 8 · Publishing (tour stop)
wizard.publish.body: Markay episode-ka diyaar yahay waxaad isu daabicsan kartaa MACU Web site-ka iyo link YouTube video-ga halkan. Waxaan daabici mayno wax kastaa tallaalkan-jira — tallaalkan waxa uu yiqiin inaan lugar-sada jira. Eeg meel midig, markaasba wad.
wizard.done.title: Taasi waxa ay tahay loopdii oo dhan!
wizard.done.body: Waxaad qaadatay script-ka tan iyo dhamaystir episode-ka. Halka halkan: edit-geli episode-ka casriga qaac, billow mid adag oo menu-ka, iyo ama fur Docs for the deeper reference. Tallaalkan-ga waxaad dib u ciyaari kartaa waqtiga kasta oo menu-ka.
tour.theme.title: Dhig inoo leh
tour.theme.body: Isgaarsiinaha → Jilka (menu-kan) ayaa dib u dhakhatiri karta Studio buuxa oo dhan: terminal amber leh laba lagu dhajiyay, iyo shan guddiyad — Starship, Wasteland, Slate Pro, Movie Palace, Dracula, iyo Pretty Princess. Beddelka waa dhakhso ah oo la xusuusto.
wizard.theme.title: Dooro muuqaalkaaga
wizard.theme.body: Intaanan waxkabuur, dhig agtada inoo leh. Fur menu-ga projects (kaas midig) → Isgaarsiinaha → Jilka. Dhig webka midka color row Terminal ah si deg deg ah ama isku day jilk buuxa sida Starship ama Movie Palace. Waxaa saldhiga ah oo barkootada ah browser-kaan.
wizard.theme.goal: Dooro jilk kasta — ama dhaaf terminal amber leh oo wad joogtaan.
filemenu.archiveEpisodeBody: Arkiivedh <0>{slug}</0>? Tani waxay episode-ga u wareejisaa faylasha lagu arki karo listiga jira guud ahaan arkiiv-ka disk-ka. Waxaa lagu celiyi karaa markale Settings → Archive laga.
filemenu.archiveShowBody: Arkiivedh <0>{show}</0> iyo dhamaan episode-yadeeda? Tani waxay show-ga oo dhan u wareejisaa listiga jira guud ahaan arkiiv-ka disk-ka. Waxaa lagu celiyi karaa markale Settings → Archive laga.
settings.archive.title: Episodes iyo shows arkiivedh
settings.archive.help: Alaabta arkiivedh-da way gaar ahaan lagu wareejiyaa listiga jira guud ahaan arkiiv-ka folder disk-ka. Celiiso mid si aad ugu soo celiso.
settings.archive.empty: Wax arkiivedh ah ayaan weli jirin.
settings.archive.slugTaken: Slug {slug} waxa qabata episode jira — dooro mid cusub
